title: Season-two capstone and wrap phase
summary: Now that season-two inland routes are live, the field season needs a capstone moment when all inland beats are logged. This wave adds a season-wrap notice, a compact atlas reflection strip, and post-capstone expedition teaser so completed players feel the season closing rather than just running out of items.

execution_order.why_now: Completing all inland routes currently ends silently; the season needs a closing beat.

execution_order.goal: Implement season capstone notice and board state.
execution_order.why_now: Players who finish season two should feel the accomplishment.
Ensure the capstone is celebratory but not bloated.
After the capstone, a tiny atlas or station reflection gives the season weight.
Completed seasons should leave a visible mark on the atlas or station.

guardrails: Capstone must use existing notice and board seams, not a new overlay.
Atlas reflection should be a tiny strip or state change, not a full summary page.
No credits sequence or ceremony — keep it notebook-toned.
Expedition teaser must stay vague enough that future content can fill it.
